## Highlights

- **`/ginee-update` works again** — was broken on every standard install since v0.10.0. (D27)
- **Lower LLM bills** — cheaper models on execution work, capable ones stay on orchestration + architecture. Out of the box. (D31)
- **Per-task model override** — prefix any dispatch with `model:reasoning` / `model:standard` / `model:fast`. (D31)
- **Team picks existing libraries first** — Phase 2 design must surface real candidates instead of building from scratch by default. (D30)
- **~70% smaller subagent returns** — more room in your context, faster multi-dispatch phases. (D29)
- **Skill commands stay predictable** — they only do mechanical ops; judgment calls hand off to `@team-lead`. (D28)

## Adopter migration

Nothing to do — D28 / D29 / D30 / D31 apply on your next dispatch.

**Stuck on a broken `/ginee-update` (v0.10.0 / v0.11.0)?** Run once:

```powershell
$env:GINEE_UPDATE_ONLY='1'; $env:GINEE_ADAPTER='claude'; iwr -useb https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

```bash
GINEE_UPDATE_ONLY=1 GINEE_ADAPTER=claude bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/main/install.sh)"
```

Future updates flow through `/ginee-update`.

Full specs: [D31](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/model-tier.md) · [D30](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/adopt-existing-solution.md) · [D29](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/strict-subagent-return-schema.md) · [D28](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/skill-runner-boundary.md) · [D27](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/installer-fetch-on-update.md).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.11.0...v0.12.0
